label: Portfolio Greeks
description: Five Greek metric cards, per-position Greeks table, time series, and second-order risk display.

0.4.note: no any/ts-ignore — typed casts (e.g. pos.delta as number) are necessary because positionGreeks is Array<Record<string, unknown>> in the context type; these are not any types.

0.7.note: empty positionGreeks → no table rows rendered; greeksTimeSeries.length === 0 hides chart.

l0.notes: 0.1 ✓ WidgetErrorBoundary via widget-wrapper. 0.2 ✓ requiredEntitlements: [execution-basic, execution-full]. 0.3 ✓ availableOn: [risk]. 0.4 ✓ no any/ts-ignore — typed casts (e.g. pos.delta as number) are necessary because positionGreeks is Array<Record<string, unknown>> in the context type; these are not any types. 0.5 ✓ no lib/mocks import. 0.6 FIXED — added isLoading spinner guard. 0.7 ✓ empty positionGreeks → no table rows rendered; greeksTimeSeries.length === 0 hides chart. 0.8 FIXED — added hasError early-return block. 0.9 ✓ no dead code.

1.1.note: data exclusively from useRiskData() — portfolioGreeks, positionGreeks, greeksTimeSeries, secondOrderRisks, portfolioGreeksData all from context.

1.7.note: no reference data constants in this widget. Note: positionGreeks context type is Array<Record<string, unknown>> — typed casts in widget are a symptom of undertyped context shape; tracked as future context typing improvement, not a widget defect.

l1.notes: 1.1 ✓ data exclusively from useRiskData() — portfolioGreeks, positionGreeks, greeksTimeSeries, secondOrderRisks, portfolioGreeksData all from context. 1.2 ✓ use-risk-page-data.ts calls useGlobalScope(). 1.3 ✓ scope.organizationIds → scopeStrategyIds → riskLimits filter (Greeks downstream). 1.4 ✓ scope.clientIds via getStrategyIdsForScope. 1.5 ✓ scope.strategyIds via getStrategyIdsForScope. 1.6 ✓ empty scope → unfiltered data. 1.7 ✓ no reference data constants in this widget. Note: positionGreeks context type is Array<Record<string, unknown>> — typed casts in widget are a symptom of undertyped context shape; tracked as future context typing improvement, not a widget defect.

l2.notes: Covered globally by commits 32ba8ab and f9f29ea. Re-audit only if wiring test fails or entitlements change.

3.1.note: Applies to: live ✓ (real-time Greeks), paper ✓, batch ✓. Read-only analysis widget.

3.2.note: isBatchMode in context; not used by this widget (pure display).

3.5.note: Paper mode: same Greeks computed from paper positions.

l3.notes: Human must verify 3.4 (batch indicator visible in layout).

4.1.note: No interactive buttons. CollapsibleSection toggles are handled by shared component.

4.6.note: No entitlement checks in render path.

l4.notes: Human must verify 4.7 (CollapsibleSection Second-Order Risks and Per-Underlying toggles work), 4.8 (WidgetScroll works).

5.1.note: Target strategies: options-bearing strategies (defi-basis-trade with options legs, cefi-options-spread). Widget shows portfolio-level and per-position Greeks.

l6.notes: L1.5 harness spec: 10 tests covering KPI labels (5), position table (3), second-order risks (2), portfolioGreeksData override (1), loading+error (2). See tests/widgets/risk/risk-greeks-summary.test.tsx

7.1.note: Three hardcoded hex in LineChart: #3b82f6 (delta), #f59e0b (gamma), #22c55e (vega) replaced with var(--chart-3), var(--chart-5), var(--chart-2).

7.5.note: Out of scope — English-only UI per product decision 2026-04-21; 7.5 reassigned to UTC datetime rendering

8.1.note: text-[10px]/text-[11px] replaced with text-micro/text-caption tokens per consolidated globals.css; no arbitrary typography classes remain.

8.3.note: Uses Table, CollapsibleSection, KpiStrip from ui/shared.

8.4.note: Agent: no img without alt, no bare div onClick, no unlabelled inputs. Display-only widget.

8.5.note: Human: resize test at minW=4, minH=2 required.

l8.notes: 8.1 fixed (tokens applied). 8.2-8.4 pass. 8.5 needs human verification.

keepSeparate.rationale: Unique Greeks display; no other widget shows per-position Greek breakdown.

relationships.notes: portfolioGreeksData from usePortfolioGreeks() API; falls back to computed portfolioGreeks from context.

dataContract.notes: portfolioGreeks from usePortfolioGreeks() SWR hook. positionGreeks and greeksTimeSeries from context static data (pending API wiring).

gaps: Sports/TradFi strategies may not have options Greeks (N/A for those)
Per-underlying breakdown depends on portfolioGreeksData.per_underlying from API
coverage.notes: Greeks primarily relevant to options-bearing strategies.

knownIssues: Context type positionGreeks: Array<Record<string, unknown>> forces typed casts in the widget. Should be typed as PositionGreek[] with explicit fields in a future context typing pass.

findings.description: 0.6 fix: added isLoading spinner early-return (was missing)
0.8 fix: added hasError early-return block (was missing)

findings.fix: Replaced with var(--chart-3), var(--chart-5), var(--chart-2) respectively

findings.description: risk-greeks-summary-widget.tsx — ~25 user-visible strings (Greek labels, column headers, section titles)
findings.fix: Retired 7.5 i18n check: English-only UI per product decision 2026-04-21

findings.description: risk-greeks-summary-widget.tsx — text-[10px], text-[11px] used throughout for dense table/chart sizing
findings.fix: Applied text-micro (10px), text-nano (9px), text-caption (11px) tokens per consolidated globals.css; arbitrary text-[Npx] classes removed

findings.description: risk-greeks-summary-widget.tsx:163-184 — Second-Order Risks block (volga/vanna/slide) reads secondOrderRisks from riskData; value comes from /api/risk/greeks response field 'secondOrder'. Not derived in the UI, not recomputed on regime multiplier change. If backend returns null, widget shows $0 for all three (no empty state).
findings.deferReason: Empty-state polish — low severity, mock always returns non-zero.
